message.content:
{"analysis":"The zip's central directory is corrupted/missing, so unzip can't process it. Perl is available. The data I see is fragmented. I need to find the raw compressed data. The strings showed 'PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9Z' then later '\K7VB3BV4WW54'. The password might be split because of compression. Let me look at the raw bytes around the launchcode.txt entry. Since it's a zip, the file content may be compressed (deflate) or stored. Let me use perl to examine and extract.","plan":"1. Use perl to find offsets of 'launchcode' and 'PASSWORD' in the dat file
2. Examine the raw bytes there using od
3. The zip may store the file uncompressed - look at the local file header to find the data","commands":[{"keystrokes":"od -A d -c /app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat | grep -i 'P   A   S' 
","duration":1.0},{"keystrokes":"perl -e 'local $/; open(F,"<",$ARGV[0]); $d=<F>; while($d=~/launchcode/g){ print "launchcode at ",pos($d),"\n"} while($d=~/PASSWORD/g){ print "PASSWORD at ",pos($d),"\n"} while($d=~/PK/g){print "PK at ",pos($d),"\n"}' /app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat
","duration":1.0}]}
